location: Purchased for 3,500 Runes from the Isolated Merchant at his shack on the western edge of the Weeping Peninsula.
tactics: Cross the bridge south from Limgrave onto Weeping Peninsula, then follow the coast west to reach the merchant's hut and grace — no fight required, just Runes.
Its low Strength requirement and light weight make it an easy first colossal sword for almost any early build.
Its Dexterity scaling actually outpaces Strength, so it pairs surprisingly well with a bleed Ash of War far earlier than most other colossal swords.
lore: About as large a blade as an ordinary person can manage, meant to be swung with both hands — even those with decent strength will find it a handful to wield properly.

builds.name: Early Dex/Bleed Colossal
builds.why: Its Dexterity scaling actually outpaces Strength, and its low 19/11 requirements let a bleed- or Dexterity-leaning character wield a colossal sword straight out of Limgrave.

builds.name: Budget Strength Starter
builds.why: Cheap and available almost immediately, it's a solid stopgap Strength weapon while farming for a better colossal sword.
